name: 4H Building @ Chase County Fairgrounds
description: 4H Building @ Chase County Fairgrounds is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Imperial, NE. There are 2 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms and lights. The courts are free.

name: Tennis/Pickleball Courts
description: Tennis/Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Imperial, NE. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.
